title: baccaurea dolichobotrys
intro: Baccaurea dolichobotrys is a plant species, also known as the Dolichobuty tree, which belongs to the family Phyllanthaceae. It is native to Southeast Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Baccaurea dolichobotrys can be used in herbal preparations such as tea, infusions, and extracts, which are commonly consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
